root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( partition by (receipt_date) order by tab.receipt_date ,tab.branch_id ,tab.receipt_no ,tab.sort_group_item) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,1,null)over( partition by (sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date) order by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item ) ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0,1) as row_memno , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no as receipt_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status as receipt_status ,( case group_item when 'SHR' then 1 when 'LON' then 5 else 99 end ) as sort_group_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item as group_item ,case when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'ISP' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description else sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name end as description
,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id as entry_id
,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name as branch_name
,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount , 0 ) as principal_amount ,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount , 0 ) as interest_amount ,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount , 0 ) as item_amount ,sc_com_m_receipt.ppm_status as ppm_status ,sc_com_m_receipt.keep_monthly as keep_monthly , decode( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , 'LON' , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) as loan_type ,( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as sum_rec FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type, sc_com_m_branch , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,si_security_user ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_rule
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no ) and
( sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) )
and si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type
and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'CSH' ,'ATM' ) /*จ่ายเงินกู้*/ and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' /*ประเภทหักกลบ*/ /*WHERE*/ )tab
